mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3D — Protected Context Registry and Evidence Query Bridge

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
import hashlib
import json

root = Path("Z:/FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3D"
installed = root / "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks = [
    (drop / "protected_context_registry_query_bridge_v1.py", installed / "protected_context_registry_query_bridge_v1.py", "96edd665af8eea2aca3563074f0e894607b03b53c22ac13d36cddc0bd58460f1"),
    (drop / "PROTECTED_CONTEXT_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed / "PROTECTED_CONTEXT_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_V1.json", "cdd4934519362bb3f67d9176f6b43216d95a9d78364a5aa75066d28a7aa6552d"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3D.md", installed / "README_V1A3D.md", "4b1c9fb432fda57ea8dae7dc38a6cf3b957cf091440f6bfe4218f433d3fb6c10"),
]
for source, target, expected_hash in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), source
    assert target.is_file(), target
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash

script_text = (installed / "protected_context_registry_query_bridge_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "protected_context_registry_query_bridge_v1.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(script_text)
imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden = {
    "subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests",
    "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser", "importlib",
}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract = json.loads((installed / "PROTECTED_CONTEXT_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260721-235244-7594A9"
assert contract["protected_context_count"] == 6
assert contract["unique_launcher_count"] == 4
assert contract["unique_path_group_count"] == 5
assert len(contract["outputs"]) == 8
assert contract["scope"]["closure_node_records_copied"] == 0
assert contract["scope"]["closure_edge_records_copied"] == 0
assert contract["scope"]["merged_closure_nodes_or_edges"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["runtime_facts_inferred_across_contexts"] is False
assert contract["scope"]["live_source_files_scanned_or_parsed"] == 0
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3D_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3D payloads, syntax, six-context contract, and zero forbidden imports
Run protected-context registry and path-normalization self-tests
Verify all six authoritative closure receipts and required evidence hashes
Build deterministic six-context protected registry without reopening live source
Validate exact eight-output registry, provenance, context boundaries, hashes, and safety
Exercise read-only list protected contexts query
Exercise read-only launcher-to-runtime-to-entry query for Workshop launcher
Exercise read-only unresolved command-alias runtime uncertainty query
